meaning: vbl.sink的过去分词和过去式adj.凹陷的
examples: The old man had sunk to his knees.
She just sat there, sunk in thought.
The sun had already sunk below the horizon.
But the sunk costs are not relevant to the decision about how quickly to withdraw.
Especially since mortgage application to buy a house have sunk back to a 15 year low.
